scores.justification: Oracle-first protocol: same-mesh/same-physics control, two analytic tripwires, inverse tests that must fail, participation-based mode ID, bit-for-bit oracle determinism check.

scores.fix: Add a second geometry or a mesh-refinement/higher-order point to support the methodology-generality claim beyond one instantiation.
scores.justification: Six-mode agreement plus a timed CPU cell is adequate for the scoped claims; single geometry/order and pending GPU cell limit generality (honestly acknowledged in Limitations).
Four bolded one-sentence-extractable contribution bullets; abstract states claim, mechanism, and both caveats.

Substrate-backed per the litsearch sibling: closest prior work (sommers2025open, ye2025electromagnetic) engaged head-on with quantitative agreement levels and a precise one-sentence wedge; TEAM tradition handled honestly in prose.

scores.fix: Resolve the repo-URL/DOI TODO(operator) and add the BRIEF-mandated 3-decimal rounding disclosure to the Reproducibility section.
scores.justification: Commits, SHA-256 fixture, committed configs/oracles, hardware and versions disclosed; repo locator still TODO(operator) and the precision-rounding disclosure is missing.

scores.fix: Rebuild Table 2 as six per-mode rows (mode | geode | Palace | rel_err) straight from results.toml.
scores.justification: Headline agreement table collapses four modes into one cell, drops per-mode Palace values/deltas, and carries values that disagree with the committed artifact; figures are unrendered placeholders pending pub-figures.
Intact IMRaD-style flow, honest-science register per the brief voice rules, consistent tense/voice, all cross-references and cite keys resolve, PDF compiled.

scores.fix: Cite a canonical tree-cotree gauging reference (via pub-litsearch re-run); complete logg2010dolfin title; retype oberkampf2010verification as @book.
scores.justification: All 28 cite keys resolve (mechanically verified, zero orphans); tree-cotree future-work claim uncited (litsearch-named gap); two bib entries have field-completeness defects.
Claims surfaced early, every section load-bearing, hedging proportional to genuine uncertainty, no restatement padding; within length target.

findings.rationale: Table 2 values (5.1528; 15.4650/18.6927/20.6976/26.0809; 0.029%; 0.000%) disagree with committed results.toml; two geode-column values are actually rounded Palace values.
findings.suggested_fix: Rebuild Table 2 as six per-mode rows sourced verbatim from results.toml (geode at 3 decimals; per-mode rel_err_pct).

findings.rationale: Abstract claims 'within 0.03% ... junction agreeing to 0.000%'; committed worst is 0.032% and junction rel_err_pct is 0.001.
findings.suggested_fix: Restate headline as 'all six modes agree to <=0.033% (worst 0.032%)' and junction agreement as 0.001%; propagate to L101-102, L357-359, L404, L414, L648, L687-688.

findings.rationale: BRIEF-mandated precision disclosure (geode stored at 3 decimals; rel_err computed vs rounded values; full-precision agreement ~0.029% worst) is absent from the Reproducibility section.
findings.suggested_fix: Add the rounding-disclosure paragraph to Section 9.

findings.rationale: Collapsed 'box/cavity modes ... same to <=0.03%' cell discards per-mode Palace values and deltas, making the caption's committed-artifact claim unverifiable from the table.
findings.suggested_fix: Six per-mode rows with a rel_err column.

findings.rationale: related-work: tree-cotree gauge projection future-work claim is uncited; the litsearch sibling's Identified-gaps list names the missing canonical citation (Albanese-Rubinacci-era, IEEE Trans. Magn. ~1988-1998).
findings.suggested_fix: Re-run pub-litsearch targeted at tree-cotree gauging; promote a resolver-verified anchor (reviewer writes no citations).

findings.rationale: logg2010dolfin title is truncated to 'DOLFIN'; oberkampf2010verification is @article with no journal (CUP monograph).
findings.suggested_fix: Complete the DOLFIN title; retype Oberkampf & Roy as @book with publisher.

findings.rationale: Literal 'TODO(operator).' strings render in two PDF footnotes (L578, L609); brief-mandated and unmistakable, but must be resolved before any submission artifact.
findings.suggested_fix: Track both operator TODOs (tracking-issue URL; repo URL + archival DOI) to resolution at revision/finalize.

critical_flags.justification: Agreement numbers disagree with the committed source-of-truth artifact benchmarks/transmon_eigen/results.toml (named as the data source by the paper itself): draft claims <=0.03% worst-case (committed worst is 0.032%, headline should be <=0.033%), 0.000% junction agreement (committed rel_err_pct 0.001), resonator row 5.1528/0.029% (committed 5.153/0.032%), and box/cavity geode values 15.4650/18.6927/20.6976/26.0809 where 20.6976 and 26.0809 are rounded Palace values in the geode-fem column (committed geode: 15.465/18.693/20.703/26.088). Ten sites enumerated in comments.md.
